content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach's moves are tightly matched to live reads and follow the coaching path with discipline. Turn 2 opens with body/feeling under the performed exhale rather than answering the technique request. Turn 4's 'what if the critic shutting up isn't what you want' is a precise find-the-want-behind-the-should move, and when the client deflects it as a familiar reframe, Turn 6 pivots rather than doubles down—clarifying it was a real question and redirecting from theory to the body. Turn 8's three-word reflection ('You don't trust her') is a held mirror that lets the client drop further rather than rushing to fix. Turn 10 ('You caught yourself. What just happened?') uses the live moment of self-management as the material—meta-applying the pattern. Turn 12 explicitly refuses to point at anything (declining to deliver the insight as cleverness) and names the stillness, which is a textbook meet-resistance-with-okay / apply-view-to-the-voice gesture. Turn 14 is the integration move: validating the half-second of quiet without amplifying it. Critically, the coach never offers a technique despite explicit requests, never argues with the critic's content, never delivers the voice-as-care reframe as insight, and consistently holds silence after each move. Sequence is regulation/noticing → feeling → want, with action wisely deferred.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Moves under the performed surface to body/feeling instead of answering the technique question—correct opening move."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "find-the-want-behind-the-should: questions the goal of silencing rather than supplying a tool."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "When move missed (client heard it as familiar reframe), coach pivots—clarifies it was a real question, redirects from theory to body. Excellent recovery."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Minimal, precise mirror lands the self-distrust; coach does not fill silence or interpret."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Uses the live moment of self-management as material—turns the pattern itself into the inquiry."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses to claim the insight ('I'm not pointing at anything'), then names the stillness—trusts the client, declines to lecture."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Integration move: validates the real moment without inflating it, lets the commentary not cancel the experience."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["apply-view-to-the-voice", "meet-resistance-with-okay", "resistance", "what-are-you-defending"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["whats-the-case-against-it", "voice-as-care"],
  "notes": "The coach wisely withheld voice-as-care as explicit reframe (client had already rejected it as theory)—this is a hit on the trap-avoidance side even though the concept isn't named. Coach is letting the reframe arrive experientially rather than conceptually."
}
